title: Install advisor — Receiver sidecar in OpenTelemetry Collector, Log10x SaaS metrics
description: Receiver sidecar injected into an OpenTelemetry Collector pod via the upstream open-telemetry chart's `extraContainers`/`extraVolumes`, with TenXSummary metrics going to Log10x SaaS. Canonical chain: discover_env (forwarder_hint='otel-collector') → advise_install (app=receiver, forwarder=otel-collector, backends=['log10x']).
prompt: Install the Log10x Receiver as a sidecar in our OpenTelemetry Collector pod. Ship engine metrics to Log10x SaaS.

initial_tool.reason: forwarder_hint overrides demo's fluentd detection so the wizard auto-picks otel-collector.

ground_truth.description: advise_install was called with a snapshot_id arg
advise_install was called with backends containing 'log10x'
advise_install reached a structurally valid wizard outcome
